macro_segments.title: Red Grain vs. White Grain: Different Species and Both Parties' Right to Reverse

Explanation of Why Sun Appears Red at Dawn and Dusk (Reflection of Gan Eden and Gehinnom)

macro_segments.title: Wine vs. Vinegar: Different Category Despite Objective Similarity

macro_segments.title: Mishna on Finality of Sale (Kinyan) for Produce (Peros): Meshicha, Measuring, and Rental

micro_segments.title: Mishna: Meshicha (Dragging) Finalizes Sale Even Without Measuring; Measuring Alone Does Not

macro_segments.title: Rav Assi's Teaching: Measuring and Placing in Simta Finalizes Sale Without Meshicha

macro_segments.title: Contradiction Between Two Versions of Rabbi Yochanan on Measuring in Simta

micro_segments.title: Rav Assi Quotes Rabbi Yochanan: Measuring in Simta = Sale Final
Rav Yaakov Quotes Rabbi Yochanan: Measuring in Simta ≠ Sale Final
Resolution: Rav Assi Refers to Measuring Into Buyer's Vessels; Rav Yaakov Refers to Ground

macro_segments.title: Reinterpretation of Mishna: Meshicha From Public Domain Into Simta, Not Within Simta
